type_error_policy: Pycairo runtime TypeError assertions map to MoonBit compile-time rejection. Region construction and boolean-operation overloads become explicit typed methods. Region and RectangleInt support equality but deliberately lack generic Hash and Compare traits.

static_api: pub fn Region::new() -> Self raise CairoError
pub fn Region::from_rectangle(RectangleInt) -> Self raise CairoError
pub fn Region::from_rectangles(ArrayView[RectangleInt]) -> Self raise CairoError
test_region.adaptation: Pycairo's overloaded Region constructor maps to separate empty, single-rectangle, and rectangle-sequence constructors so invalid object and sequence element types are rejected statically.

static_api: pub fn Region::get_rectangle(Self, Int) -> RectangleInt raise CairoError
test_get_rectangle.adaptation: Out-of-range indexes map to CairoInvalidArgument(InvalidIndex, _); non-integer indexes are rejected statically.
